entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate resilient nutri-cereal vital for food and nutrition security in arid and semi-arid regions.

entities.name: CO2 LEVELS
entities.description: Atmospheric concentrations of carbon dioxide.

entities.name: ELEVATED CO2
entities.description: Increased CO2 levels, specifically 550 and 700 ppm.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output and yield of the crop.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The concentration of essential nutrients in the crop.

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to sufficient, safe, and nutritious food globally.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country with arid and semi-arid regions where pearl millet is grown.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is vital for food security.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the pearl millet plant.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the plant tissues.

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the nitrogen status and efficiency in the plant.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: FLAVONOID CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The level of flavonoid compounds in the grain.

entities.name: GRAIN IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron (Fe) in the grain.

entities.name: GRAIN ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of zinc (Zn) in the grain.

entities.name: GRAIN PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the grain.

entities.name: FODDER PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the fodder.

entities.name: CO2 FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The process where increased CO2 levels stimulate plant growth and productivity.

entities.name: GERMPLASM EVALUATION
entities.description: The systematic assessment of genetic resources to identify desirable traits.

entities.name: TARGETED BREEDING
entities.description: The process of breeding plants for specific climate-resilient traits.

entities.name: ICMB 92111
entities.description: A specific genotype of pearl millet.

entities.name: ICMB 92888
entities.description: A specific genotype of pearl millet.

entities.name: HHB67IMP
entities.description: A specific genotype of pearl millet.

entities.name: NBH 4903
entities.description: A specific genotype of pearl millet.
